name: CMN Substrate
synopsis: The shared Rust library for CMN — data models, cryptographic verification, tree hashing, URI parsing, and JSON-schema validation used by Hypha and Synapse.
intent: Provide the common foundation shared between Hypha (client) and Synapse (indexer): spore/mycelium data models, Ed25519 signature verification, BLAKE3 content hashing, CMN URI parsing, and spore.core.json schema validation
mutations: Add Mycelium::remove_spore to delist a spore from the inventory by id — the library primitive behind hypha mycelium spore yank, so a spore can be dropped without re-signing the whole graph

Reimplement local_dir_name on the agent-first-slug library (Unicode-aware slugging, dots preserved between decimal digits) and add is_safe_local_path_segment to validate an existing path segment without recomputing the canonical slug
Track agent-first-data 0.19.1 and upgrade crypto/schema dependencies (ed25519-dalek 3.0, jsonschema 0.48)

bonds.reason: Implements core CMN data structures and verification logic per the specification
